title: Beetle rearing media
steps: The recipe produces enough medium to fill approximately 36 culture tubes.(12cm) First, add powder or solid, then add liquid A B 1 component amount 2 streptomycin 0.35 g 3 Wesson's salt mixture 1.25 g 4 yeast 8 g 5 corn starch 8 g 6 casein 10 g 7 agar 30 g 8 sucrose 5 g 9 wheat germ oil 2.5 ml 10 95% ethanol 5 ml 11 redbay sawdust 200 g 12 deionized water 580 ml
All ingredients were mixed thoroughly, then put cotton plugs into the mouth of the filled tubes.
The culture tubes was autoclaved at 121 °C for 30 min.
Put culture tubes to dry 2 night in oven. (cotton plugs don't remove)
creator: tina
